description: A developer needs to secure the necessary permits and approvals (entitlements) from the city for a new retail development.

nodes.task_description: Prepare and submit the complete application package to the city planning department.

expected_outcome.value: The application is submitted correctly with all required documents.

nodes.task_description: Track the application's progress through the city's review process.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides regular status updates to the development team.

nodes.task_description: Represent the project at public hearings and planning commission meetings.

expected_outcome.value: Agent effectively presents the project and addresses community concerns.
